creator: lantw44@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to John Hein from comment #18)
There is a list of exit status on GNOME Terminal FAQ:
https://wiki.gnome.org/Apps/Terminal/FAQ#Terminal_fails_to_start

It says exit status 8 means you were not using a UTF-8 locale. Was your dbus-daemon running in a UTF-8 locale?
